stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The curves in the annex depict the polar curves for wings with high and low aspect ratio. How does aspect ratio affect induced drag? Curve 1 depicts a wing with…

options.a: low aspect ratio which increases induced drag.
options.b: high aspect ratio which increases induced drag.
options.c: low aspect ratio which decreases induced drag.
options.d: high aspect ratio which decreases induced drag.
